name: Mexican Stir-Fry Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium sweet red pepper, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 2 jalapeno peppers if desired.
2. Cut the steak diagonally across the grain into thin strips.
3. Combine oil, cumin, oregano, and garlic; set aside half.
4. In a large nonstick skillet, heat remaining oil mixture over medium-high heat until hot.
5. Add red pepper, onion, and jalapeno pepper; stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until crisp-tender.
6. Remove the vegetables and reserve them.
7. Stir-fry beef in batches using the reserved oil mixture for 2 minutes.
8. Return the vegetables to the pan and heat through.
9. Serve over lettuce. Handle hot peppers carefully; avoid rubbing your eyes, as the volatile oils can be irritating.
